Proof

Detection stories and case studies

Real results from SAM4 deployments across water, steel, chemicals, mining, and more. Every story backed by validated data.

10,000+ assets monitored. 90.8% detection rate. 0.32% false positive rate. Named customers. Quantified outcomes.

36 Stories
8 Industries
14 Asset types
10 Fault types

Alert prevents pollution event and saves EUR 100k

SAM4 detected clogging / blockage in sewage pump: €100k saved.
